title: piper lunulibracteatum var. villirameum
intro: Piper lunulibracteatum var. villirameum, also known as the Long-Bract Piper, is a variety of flowering plant in the pepper family (Piperaceae). It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing fever, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Long-Bract Piper typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves and stems, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin conditions.
